title: hyoscyamus orthocarpus
intro: Hyoscyamus orthocarpus, also known as Dyer's Alkanet or Hairy Alkanet, is a plant species belonging to the borage family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antispasmodic and anticholinergic agent, which helps to relax muscles and reduce spasms. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an anti-anxiety agent. Hyoscyamus orthocarpus can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
